name: Bootstrap Meta Files
description: Create CLAUDE.md, features.json, progress.md, and /docs structure for project documentation and tracking.
tests: Verify all files exist and are properly formatted. No automated tests required.

name: Setup Astro DB
description: Configure Astro DB with schema for users, cashback_transactions, purchase_claims, and payout_requests tables.
tests: npm run dev starts without DB errors. Can insert/query test records.

name: User Dashboard
description: Create user profile page showing: current balance, pending cashback, transaction history, and loyalty tier.
tests: npx playwright test tests/user-dashboard.spec.ts - User can view their dashboard when logged in.

name: Purchase Claim Flow
description: User submits purchase claim with Amazon order ID and product. Creates pending claim for admin review.
tests: npx playwright test tests/purchase-claim.spec.ts - User can submit claim, sees it in pending state.

name: Admin Claim Verification
description: Admin panel to view pending claims, approve/reject with notes. Approved claims credit user balance.
tests: npx playwright test tests/admin-claims.spec.ts - Admin can approve claim, user balance updates.

name: Cashback Calculation
description: Calculate cashback amount based on commission percentage and user loyalty tier. Tiers: Bronze (base), Silver (+5%), Gold (+10%).
tests: Unit tests for calculation logic. Verify tier bonuses apply correctly.

name: Payout Request System
description: User requests payout when balance >= $15. Choose PayPal or Crypto. Admin processes and marks complete.
tests: npx playwright test tests/payout.spec.ts - User can request payout, admin can process it.

name: SEO Structured Data
description: Add JSON-LD schema markup for products (Product schema), lists (ItemList), breadcrumbs, and organization.
tests: Validate with Google Rich Results Test. Check product pages have correct schema.

name: Blog Content Type
description: Add blog/articles content collection. Create blog index page, article detail page, and admin CRUD.
tests: npx playwright test tests/blog.spec.ts - Can view blog index, read articles.

name: User Click Tracking
description: Associate affiliate link clicks with logged-in users. Store in DB for purchase claim correlation.
tests: Logged-in user clicks link, click is recorded with user ID in database.

name: Product Detail Page Refinement
description: Enhance product pages with better layout, image gallery, pros/cons display, and related products.
tests: npx playwright test tests/product-detail.spec.ts - Product page displays all sections correctly.

name: Homepage Redesign
description: Design compelling homepage with featured products, popular lists, value proposition, and CTA for registration.
tests: npx playwright test tests/homepage.spec.ts - Homepage loads with all sections.
